case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JAMES NICKS ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT NICKS, JAMES
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT NICKS, JAMES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NICKS, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 321 CLEMENTINA STREET, #310, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT NICKS, JAMES DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED NOV-02-2016, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $5.70 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NICKS, JAMES
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT NICKS, JAMES
